calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-16-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:37am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis; Clerk J. Kong, D525, Not Reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.

Samer Danfoura, Esq., for Respondent/Plaintiff Samy Zabarah, who is also present with witness, Shaima Zabarah.
Vijay Vasudevan, Defendant/Appellant, appears as propria Persona

Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Jason Jungreis.

Samer Danfoura, Esq., testifies on behalf of the respondent/plaintiff
EXHR (A) Mutual Agreement and Release
EXHR (B) 2 Emails (Dec 26,2013 & Jan 10, 2014)
EXHR (C) 2 Roundtrip tickets
EXHR (D) E-lance communications
EXHR (E) Internet Arbitration Award

Vijay Vasudevan testifies on his own behalf.
Samy Danfura testifies on his own behalf.
Closing argument from both parties.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
Newly evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Continued To Aug-19-14 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Reset From May-06-14 To Jun-25-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
